ESLint: 9.35.0

A configuration object specifies rule "jsx-a11y/alt-text", but could not find plugin "jsx-a11y".

Common causes of this problem include:

1. The "jsx-a11y" plugin is not defined in your configuration file.
2. The "jsx-a11y" plugin is not defined within the same configuration object in which the "jsx-a11y/alt-text" rule is applied.
